name: HYDRA Regulatory Intelligence
description: Real-time regulatory intelligence for prediction markets. SEC, CFTC, Fed, FinCEN monitoring. Oracle data for UMA and Chainlink. 22 paid API endpoints from $0.001 USDC via x402 on Base L2.

workflows.name: Regulatory Risk Scan
workflows.description: Analyze a business against all applicable regulatory frameworks with scored impact assessment.

workflows.name: Prediction Market Signal
workflows.description: Get HYDRA's scored regulatory probability and expected price impact for a specific prediction market.

workflows.name: Alpha Report
workflows.description: Premium alpha report with regulatory probability, edge vs market price, Kelly sizing, entry price, and trade verdict.

workflows.name: FOMC Decision Classification
workflows.description: Real-time FOMC decision classification (HOLD/CUT/HIKE + basis points) within 30 seconds of release.

workflows.name: Web Scrape
workflows.description: Convert any URL to clean structured text. High-volume agent utility.

workflows.name: Token Price Lookup
workflows.description: Current price, 24h change, market cap, and volume for any listed cryptocurrency.

workflows.name: RSS Feed Parser
workflows.description: Parse any RSS or Atom feed URL into structured JSON entries.

workflows.name: Wallet Balance
workflows.description: ETH and USDC balance for any address on Base L2.

workflows.name: UMA Oracle Assertion
workflows.description: UMA Optimistic Oracle assertion data with evidence chain for regulatory market resolution.

workflows.name: Gas Prices
workflows.description: Current Base L2 gas prices with estimated costs for ETH transfers, ERC-20 transfers, swaps, and NFT mints.

workflows.name: Transaction Status
workflows.description: Look up a transaction receipt on Base L2 — confirmation status, gas used, block number.

workflows.name: Batch Utility Calls
workflows.description: Execute up to 5 utility endpoint calls in a single request. Saves gas costs vs individual x402 payments.
